楚风穿越到卡牌纪元，人类依靠词条组合卡牌，召唤历史英灵和渊魔作战。
华夏却因历史扭曲模糊，沦为最弱之地，受尽屈辱，连樱花小国都可派驻“特使”，肆意攫取资源！
觉醒日上，楚风组合出紫卡吕布，震惊全校。
然而在特使逼迫下，专利被夺。
楚风更是被冠以“汉奸”之名。
面对千夫所指，同窗鄙夷，他默不作声。
试炼秘境，别人组队刷怪，他单骑深入。
当他打爆秘境渊魔，当他成为试炼第一，当吕布爆发出无双战力……
所有人才惊觉，他组合出的，是何等恐怖的存在！
而这，只是开始。
关羽、赵云、霍去病、白起……
一个个被历史尘埃掩埋的华夏英灵，终将在他手中，重现世间，震惊全球！
以华夏之魂，铸最强卡组！
以万千英灵，镇无尽深渊！
“谁说华夏无强卡？今日，我便是华夏卡牌的开辟者！”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/611a2d7b7e5386bc0604b57bf1174fd6","author":"老巴","author_id":"","book_id":"7542800606549773336","book_name":"华夏弱？我全是传说级英灵","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281008","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1.8万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1014,"name":"都市高武","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1014&name=都市高武&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":516,"name":"都市异能","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=516&name=都市异能&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":874,"name":"卡牌","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=874&name=卡牌&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7542800707271803416","read_count":"17668","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"868167"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"7.2","serial_count":"418","tags":"都市高武,都市,穿越,都市异能,打脸,卡牌","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4225a92a69c64d0bcc5f8390708ee7c3~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779323284&x-signature=NVims0XJ0t8njPKEa196pQmXW38%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1094761965693182","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"22"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032208280457EE97A914DA2D6E1BA2"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读1小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":1,"forwarded_count":0,"li   首先我很推荐这本小说非常好看
再说一下我的推荐原因:
第一，虽然前面确实憋屈但是不要急，耐心看下去很快就起飞，第二，在卡牌制作类小说里面，质量算非常可以的了，虽然少了一些智斗计谋但是对于爽文开后宫来说已经非常好了，第三我看了很多小说这本对我的吸引力不比那些9.8，9.9评分的小说低。非常推荐，作者加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765707924,"group_id":"7542800606549773336","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"一位在职大学生的自娱自乐","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxhXjwcL9spovFBQr0OIg9RsX7RpTTOSS8Ls+erctBA5","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/f362627a43db4f34835c29202316a6ea~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704653&x-signature=m6Qg4cV4%2FeOD8oRHtMp10nAaylk%3D","user_id":"2014717988837283","user_name":"喜欢蛇麻子的裘少"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2014717988837283","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author","intro":"{"title_name":"作家","title_id":"author"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_default_color":"{\"start\":\"#FF9F31\",\"end\":\"#FFB95C\"}","bg_dark_color":"{\"start\":\"#CC8029\",\"end\":\"#CC9349\"}","title_dark_diaphaneity":"CC"}","zh_title":"作家"}]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7542800606549773336","book_info":{"abstract":"【卡牌词条+华夏英雄+高武背景+战斗成长+英雄配图】
楚风穿越到卡牌纪元，人类依靠词条组合卡牌，召唤历史英灵和渊魔作战。
华夏却因历史扭曲模糊，沦为最弱之地，受尽屈辱，连樱花小国都可派驻“特使”，肆意攫取资源！
觉醒日上，楚风组合出紫卡吕布，震惊全校。
然而在特使逼迫下，专利被夺。
楚风更是被冠以“汉奸”之名。
面对千夫所指，同窗鄙夷，他默不作声。
试炼秘境，别人组队刷怪，他单骑深入。
当他打爆秘境渊魔，当他成为试炼第一，当吕布爆发出无双战力……
所有人才惊觉，他组合出的，是何等恐怖的存在！
而这，只是开始。
关羽、赵云、霍去病、白起……
一个个被历史尘埃掩埋的华夏英灵，终将在他手中，重现世间，震惊全球！
以华夏之魂，铸最强卡组！
以万千英灵，镇无尽深渊！
